workflow.name: Neo4j HA existing
workflow.description: Bootstrap and validate Neo4j HA from an existing automation runner and target inventory.

data.label: Prepare Neo4j inventory
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
apt-get update
DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y ansible sshpass
cat >/tmp/neo4j-inventory.ini <<'INVENTORY'
[neo4j]
10.31.89.11 role=neo4j name=neo4j-01
10.31.89.12 role=neo4j name=neo4j-02
10.31.89.13 role=neo4j name=neo4j-03
INVENTORY

data.label: Install Neo4j container runtime
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/neo4j-runtime.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: neo4j
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.shell: |
        if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          docker --version
          exit 0
        fi
        if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          apt-get update
          DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y docker.io docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          dnf install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          yum install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        fi
        systemctl enable --now docker
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/neo4j-inventory.ini /tmp/neo4j-runtime.yml

data.label: Render Neo4j cluster manifests
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/neo4j-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: neo4j
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.file:
        path: /opt/octastack/neo4j
        state: directory
        mode: "0750"
    - ansible.builtin.copy:
        dest: /opt/octastack/neo4j/compose.yml
        mode: "0640"
        content: |
          services:
            neo4j:
              image: neo4j:5
              container_name: octastack-neo4j
              restart: unless-stopped
              environment:
                NEO4J_AUTH: "neo4j/change-me"
              ports:
                - "7474:7474"
                - "7687:7687"
              volumes:
                - data:/data
          volumes:
            data: {}
PLAYBOOK

data.label: Deploy Neo4j cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >>/tmp/neo4j-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/neo4j/compose.yml pull
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/neo4j/compose.yml up -d
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/neo4j/compose.yml ps
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/neo4j-inventory.ini /tmp/neo4j-deploy.yml

data.label: Document Neo4j topology
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/neo4j-topology.md <<'EOF'
# Neo4j HA topology

Members:
- neo4j-01: 10.31.89.11 (neo4j)
- neo4j-02: 10.31.89.12 (neo4j)
- neo4j-03: 10.31.89.13 (neo4j)

This example deploys one Neo4j container per member host. Replace the placeholder commands with vendor-supported clustering, TLS, backup, and failover automation before production use.
EOF
cat /tmp/neo4j-topology.md

data.label: Validate Neo4j cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
ansible -i /tmp/neo4j-inventory.ini neo4j -b -m shell -a 'docker ps --format "{{.Names}} {{.Status}}"'

data.label: Neo4j HA health check
data.command: docker exec octastack-neo4j cypher-shell -u neo4j -p change-me 'RETURN 1;'
